subject: Your Morning Paper - April 12, 2026
html:
News To Me

Your Morning Paper

Sunday, April 12, 2026

TLDR

  • Inflation jumped after a sharp energy-price spike, keeping pressure on households and policymakers.
  • AI and platform risk stayed in focus after a security incident targeting OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and fresh concerns around Anthropic's new model.
  • Big consumer-tech bets are still moving, with foldable iPhone testing reportedly advancing toward production.

This is a real-recipient Gmail delivery check for the News To Me Sprint 0 email path. The content is sample POC material assembled from the earlier SCRUM-8 and SCRUM-10 artifacts.

Read the full edition

Sender is still the Resend onboarding test domain for this POC, so inbox placement may differ from a production sender domain.
